r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Skin cancer requires aggressive treatment: surgery (cutting), radiation (burning), or topical chemotherapy (poison). Natural remedies are unproven alternatives that desperate people try when real medicine fails.

f_freedom_promise.primary_transformation: CURE non-melanoma skin cancer (basal cell, squamous cell) completely in 3 months or less, with zero recurrence, zero scarring, and zero healthy tissue damage

headline.verbatim_text: CURE Cancer with EGGPLANT?! That's C-U-R-E, not just improve—one of today's most common and scariest cancers. Usually in under 3 months! 80,000 success stories and not one case of cancer coming back...

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Cancer = incurable/requires aggressive treatment. Claiming CURE (not treatment) with vegetable extract violates deepest medical and cultural schemas about cancer.
schema_analysis.whitespace_territory: Absolute cancer cure claim (the ultimate forbidden territory in health marketing)

lead.full_text: How did this one get covered up? EGGPLANT! And the latest research isn't from some fly-by-night outfit that you'd be afraid to take your dog to—but the Royal London Hospital. Virtually the entire medical press ignored this natural discovery. But one courageous M.D. broke the news—and has spent his career proving that nobody does it better than Mother Nature. Would you believe that an extract from eggplant could cure—that's cure, not just improve—the majority of non-melanoma skin cancers (squamous and basal cell cancers), usually in three months or less? This may seem like an outrageous claim, but researchers have known about these incredible results for over 20 years! It might have remained a secret for another two decades if award-winning doctor Jonathan Wright, M.D. hadn't published the research—and dared tell the truth: It's a cure! Using a form of eggplant extract called BEC5, doctors treated both invasive and non-invasive non-melanoma skin cancers. The results were equal to those resulting from invasive surgery, minus the scars. Follow-up research shows: once their cancer went away, it did not recur. Over 80,000 patients have used it successfully. Microscopic analysis consistently shows death of all cancer cells. Better yet, no cancer has ever returned.

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Lead uses the word CURE multiple times for cancer—the most forbidden claim in health marketing. Royal London Hospital legitimacy + 80,000 success stories + zero recurrence violates all cancer-treatment expectations.
schema_analysis.whitespace_territory: Absolute cancer cure from natural source (ultimate suppressed-remedy narrative)

primary_mechanism.name: Solamargine Glycoalkaloid Selective Cytotoxicity
primary_mechanism.explanation: BEC5 (a standardized extract from eggplant, also called Curaderm) contains a mixture of solasodine glycosides—particularly solamargine. Cancer cells have DIFFERENT receptors on their surface than healthy cells. Specifically, they have rhamnose receptors that healthy cells lack. Solamargine binds to these rhamnose receptors, gets internalized by the cancer cell, and triggers apoptosis (programmed cell death) from within. Healthy cells don't have these receptors, so they're completely unaffected. With microscopic precision, BEC5 selects and eliminates ONLY cancer cells while leaving healthy tissue untouched—unlike surgery (removes healthy tissue), radiation (damages surrounding tissue), or chemotherapy (kills healthy cells indiscriminately).

mechanism_proof.description: Royal London Hospital double-blind, placebo-controlled study showing equivalence to surgery without scars
80,000 patients treated since 1980s with ZERO cancer recurrence documented
Consistent histological confirmation of complete cancer cell death with healthy cell preservation

three_part_structure.what_they_think: Skin cancer requires aggressive treatment: surgery (cutting), radiation (burning), or topical chemotherapy (poison). Natural remedies are unproven alternatives that desperate people try when real medicine fails.
three_part_structure.what_real: Cancer cells have DIFFERENT surface receptors than healthy cells. BEC5 exploits this difference to trigger selective cancer cell death while completely sparing healthy tissue. This isn't an 'alternative'—it's superior to conventional treatments in every measurable way: efficacy, safety, cosmetic outcome, and cost. But dermatology practices make $150-500 per skin cancer removal. BEC5 costs $40 and you apply it at home.
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: Surgery removes visible cancer but traumatizes surrounding tissue and leaves scars. Radiation damages healthy cells along with cancer cells. Topical chemo (fluorouracil) kills indiscriminately, causing severe burns. None of these exploit the fundamental biological difference between cancer cells and healthy cells the way BEC5 does. They're crude instruments where surgical precision is possible.

narrative_reorganization.domain_scope: skin cancer, cancer treatment, natural medicine suppression
narrative_reorganization.self_blame_removal: You weren't being foolish by questioning whether cutting/burning/poisoning was the only option. Your instinct that 'there must be a better way' was correct. The better way existed for 26+ years but was systematically suppressed.
narrative_reorganization.coherence_creation: Connects: disfiguring skin cancer surgery + multiple recurrences + expensive dermatology visits + 'cancer is incurable' narrative + suppression of natural alternatives → all explained by economic protection of dermatology profit centers
narrative_reorganization.new_self_concept: Not a cancer patient facing inevitable disfigurement, but someone with access to a genuine cure that the medical establishment buried for economic reasons

promise_architecture.timeframe: Typically 8-12 weeks for complete cancer elimination
promise_architecture.specificity: 100% cancer cell death confirmed by microscopy, 80,000 successes with zero documented recurrence, cosmetic outcome superior to surgery

tier_1_proof.description: Royal London Hospital double-blind, placebo-controlled study published in peer-reviewed literature
80,000+ patients treated since 1980s with careful record-keeping showing ZERO cancer recurrence

tier_2_proof.description: Consistent histological analysis showing complete cancer cell death with healthy cell preservation
Dr. Jonathan V. Wright—Linus Pauling Award winner, 40+ years clinical experience, thousands of patients

metadata.publisher: Nutrition & Healing / Dr. Jonathan V. Wright
metadata.product: BEC5 Eggplant Extract for Skin Cancer
metadata.big_idea: Eggplant extract cures non-melanoma skin cancer with 100% success rate and zero recurrence—but was buried because it threatens dermatology profits

fssit_candidates.statement: The medical press IGNORED this. Royal London Hospital published a double-blind, placebo-controlled study showing that eggplant extract CURES skin cancer as effectively as surgery—with no scars, no recurrence, and zero healthy tissue damage. But the medical journals buried it. Dermatology practices make $150-500 every time they cut a skin cancer off your body. BEC5 costs $40 and you apply it at home. You do the math.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Explains why an effective cancer cure remained obscure for 26+ years despite gold-standard clinical evidence. Names the economic protection racket. Exposes medical journalism as captured by specialty interests.

fssit_candidates.statement: Cancer cells are DIFFERENT from healthy cells. They have rhamnose receptors on their surface that healthy cells don't have. BEC5 binds to these receptors like a key fitting a lock—gets internalized, and triggers the cancer cell to kill itself. It's not 'alternative medicine.' It's PRECISION MEDICINE using a biological difference that surgery, radiation, and chemo completely ignore.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Completely reframes what's 'advanced' vs 'primitive.' Reveals that cutting/burning/poisoning are the crude approaches, while the natural compound is the sophisticated one. Inverts the alternative/conventional hierarchy.

fssit_candidates.statement: It's been 26 years. Over 80,000 people have used BEC5 successfully. Not one case of cancer returning. Not ONE. Microscopic analysis consistently shows complete death of all cancer cells. Yet your dermatologist never mentioned it—because if they did, they'd lose $150-500 every time they sent you home with a $40 tube of eggplant cream instead of cutting your face.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: The zero-recurrence statistic over 80,000 cases is virtually impossible to ignore. Explains doctor silence through economic incentive. Makes suppression conspiracy undeniable through sheer weight of evidence.

rsf_analysis.fssit_placement_pattern: Central organizing principle—entire swipe is built around the FSSIT of 'they've been hiding the cure.' Every section reinforces: lead (medical press ignored it), mechanism (precision vs crude), proof (80,000 successes, zero recurrence), and close (economic motives named).

temporal_analysis.cultural_moment_reference: Post-1980s BEC5 research, 2000s+ growing cancer treatment skepticism, natural medicine revival
temporal_analysis.temporal_urgency_device: Skin cancer epidemic (1M+ new cases yearly), daily UV damage accumulating, cosmetic disfigurement from conventional treatment, suppression continuing
evergreen_elements: Skin cancer prevalence (increasing with sun exposure)
80,000 success rate with zero recurrence (documented record)
